title: API to download APP Usage Data
excerpt:
Hi, 
As an app vendor it would be good if we could have an API to download the APP Analytics data in app in an automated manner so that we could then uplaod this into our own data lake so we could create reports and dash…

posts.author: kwalker (Kristian Walker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

As an app vendor it would be good if we could have an API to download the APP Analytics data in app in an automated manner so that we could then uplaod this into our own data lake so we could create reports and dashboards using this data inside our own analytics solution.

Can you please advise if there are any plans to release an API or set of APIs to allow this data to be downlaoded.

Thanks,
Kristian

App Vendor ( Adaptavist )

posts.author: samicaracand (Sami Caracand (DocuGen))
posts.cookedHtml:
Big +1 to this suggestion. I also requested it in a separate post:
/#/t/84356

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Moved this to the feature requests section so people can vote for it.

FYI @samicaracand @kwalker
